name: CCC Bridge
description: Bridge to Claude Code Chat sessions via SSH + Unix socket.

socketPath.description: Path to CCC Unix socket on remote (default ~/.ccc.sock)

defaultFrom.description: Default sender name for ask/send (default openclaw)

sessionAllowlist.description: Allowlist of session names. Empty array = all sessions allowed.

webhook.description: Webhook server for receiving push events from CCC

bind.description: Bind address: 'lan' (0.0.0.0), 'localhost' (127.0.0.1), or raw IP (default localhost)
